lessons.title: I Have a Pet
lessons.topic: Cat, Dog, Bird and the I like pattern

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet loves to swim in water?
questions.hint: This pet has fins and swims.

questions.question_text: Which pet wiggles its nose and hops?
questions.hint: This pet loves to eat carrots!

questions.question_text: Which pet has feathers and likes to say Polly?
questions.hint: This pet is colorful and can talk!

steps.title: Tom's Pets
steps.text: Tom has a pet. It is a cat. Tom says, 'I like my cat.' The cat is with a bird. Do you like birds?

questions.question: What does Tom say about his cat?

steps.explanation: Say 'I like' to talk about pets you love.

steps.audio_text: I have a dog. He loves to run in the park. Do you like dogs?

questions.question: What does her dog like to do?

questions.question_text: Which word is a pet?
I like ___s. (Grammar question)
Does she have a bird?
What pattern is used in 'I like dogs'?

lessons.title: I Don't Like...
lessons.topic: Rabbit, Mouse, Turtle and negative preference

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet has long ears and loves to hop?
questions.hint: This pet loves to eat carrots!

questions.question_text: Which pet is tiny, loves cheese, and squeaks?
questions.hint: It is a common cartoon character!

questions.question_text: Which animal moves slowly and has a shell on its back?
questions.hint: It carries its home like a backpack!

steps.title: Turtle's Friends
steps.text: Look! A turtle is slow. I don't like the mouse. I like the rabbit. The rabbit jumps high.

steps.explanation: Use 'I like' for things you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: I don't like mice, but I like turtles and rabbits. Does your brother like turtles too?

questions.question_text: Which word means a small animal that squeaks? (Vocabulary question)
I don't like ___. (Fill in the blank with a grammar pattern)
True or False: Rabbits have long ears.
Which animal carries its home on its back?
Does she like turtles? Choose 'Yes' or 'No'.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal likes to wag its tail when happy? 🐶
questions.hint: This animal loves to play fetch.

questions.question_text: Which pet swims and has colorful scales? 🐟
questions.hint: It swims in water and can be different colors.

questions.question_text: Which furry animal purrs when you pet it? 🐱
questions.hint: This animal likes to curl up and nap.

steps.title: Splash the Fish
steps.text: Do you like water? Splash the fish does! Splash is in the pond. I like Splash because it is cute. Do you like Splash?

steps.explanation: Use this to say what you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: Do you like fish swimming in the water? Yes, they are very colorful and fun to watch!

questions.question_text: Do you like ___ fish? (Grammar question)
What swims in the water? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Water is dry.
What do you say if you like apples? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet can fly and sing?
questions.hint: This pet has feathers and loves to talk!

questions.question_text: Which pet has a shell and moves very slowly?
questions.hint: This pet can live in water or on land!

questions.question_text: Which pet is known for barking?
questions.hint: This pet loves to wag its tail and play fetch!

steps.title: Pets and Preferences
steps.text: My name is Mia. I like dogs and fish. I have one big dog. I don't like snakes. Do you like fish? Yes, I do!

questions.question: Does Mia have a big dog?

steps.audio_text: I have a small brown dog named Buddy. Buddy loves playing with his red ball in the park. I like watching him run.

questions.question: Does Buddy like playing in the park?

steps.prompt: Tell me one pet you like and one pet you don't like. You can say: I like cats, I don't like frogs.
steps.expected_text: i like cats i don't like frogs

questions.question_text: I ___ fish. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'dog'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Cats can fly.
What does 'Buddy loves to play' mean? (Reading comprehension)
Do you like pets? (Grammar question)
